name: User Intent
description: Classify a Discord message into a structured intent with entities and confidence.
example_prompt: Classify the intent of: 'Can someone help me set up the bot to log joins and leaves?'

schema.title: UserIntent
schema.description: Structured intent classification for a Discord message

topic.description: Main topic or feature the user is asking about

requires_response.description: Whether this message expects a bot response

suggested_command.description: Bot command that would address this intent, if applicable
